chunks.title: Vision of Yahweh against Edom
chunks.reason: The opening vision declaring God's judgment on Edom's arrogance.

chunks.title: Oracle of Total Ruin
chunks.reason: A prophetic oracle detailing the complete destruction and shame awaiting Edom.

chunks.title: Exhortation on Edom's Betrayal
chunks.reason: Specific commands to the Edomites regarding their hostile actions during Jerusalem's calamity.

chunks.title: Argument of Retribution and Restoration
chunks.reason: The theological conclusion regarding the Day of Yahweh, judgment on nations, and restoration for Jacob.
